fields.name: Counter Stool
fields.description: Elevate your kitchen with the St. Laurent Counter Stool – a masterpiece featuring green weave linen upholstery, mid-brown mango wood frame, and brass cross bars for timeless sophistication.

fields.name: Emiko Loveseat
fields.description: Invest in quality and elevate your seating experience with the Emiko Loveseat – a beautifully crafted piece featuring a solid wood structure, sleek design, and superior materials that offer both comfort and style for any living space.

fields.name: Art Deco RoseGold Modern Mirror
fields.description: Art Deco Rosegold Mirror is the finest collection in our mirror. It represents the beauty of modern-day mirrors, unlike traditional old-fashioned mirrors. This mirror has a classical bevel edge surrounding all the corner edges which makes it attractive and a perfect peice for our wall. With our four hooks features, this mirror can be hung horizontally and vertically. This mirror can be customized by us, so if you are looking for customize mirror feel free to contact us.

fields.name: Sangam Ceramic Serving Bowl Large
fields.description: Crafted in ceramic with a deep set form, this serving bowl is designed for heartier portions. Whether for curries or pasta, its size and finish bring style to the table. The glaze holds up to regular use with ease. Rinse gently to retain sheen. Pair with matching dinnerware or keep it central as a statement piece.

fields.name: Golden Ravish Metal Bath Accessories
fields.description: Timeless and sleek, this three-piece metal bath set combines elegant finish with fine etched detailing. Including a dispenser, tumbler, and lidded jar, it offers both organisation and sophistication for vanity spaces. Durable and functional, it transforms daily rituals into refined experiences. Place it with coordinated towels or ceramic trays to create a bathroom arrangement that feels complete, polished, and indulgent without compromising on everyday practicality.

fields.name: Braided Floor Lamp
fields.description: Looking for a floor lamp thats got charm? This beautys got it in spades. With a carved wooden stand that feels like something straight out of your favorite vintage shop, and a soft white shade that glows like the moon on a clear night, its the perfect mix of old-world elegance and modern coziness. Just imagine curling up with a good book under its warm light.

fields.name: Eclat Mango Wood Coffee Table - Walnut
fields.description: Combining strength, style, and practicality, this coffee table is a stunning addition to any living room. The top is made from kiln-dried, chemically treated mango wood for durability, while sturdy laminated wooden legs provide solid support. Elegant electroplated gold steel legs add a touch of sophistication. The spacious lower shelf offers extra storage or display space, making this table both functional and attractive.

fields.name: Artistry Regalia Canvas Picture Frame
fields.description: Give your space a modern boost with this canvas picture frame. Featuring a striking abstract design, mounted on high-quality canvas with a sturdy MDF backing and framed in sleek PS. It blends contemporary style with artistic elegance, ideal for elevating any decor.

fields.name: Bleam Rose Ceramic Decorative Platter
fields.description: Showcase your favourite snacks with this decorative platter from Home Centre. Made with ceramic, this platter features a rose design and is sturdy. This platter will enhance the vision of your dining table and living room.

fields.name: HOMESAKE Metal Cluster Ceiling Lamp
fields.description: Illuminate your dining room or living room with this striking cluster pendant, which features three graduated golden crystal cylindrical-shaped lights suspended from a round plate on black-finished rods artfully displayed at different heights. Rich, rustic, and unmistakably stylish, this gorgeous 3-light hanging fixture marries brilliant character with impeccable taste.

fields.name: Paulo Fabric Accent Chair - Grey
fields.description: Lounge in comfort with this chair. The bentwood construction and veneer finish, that is cladded on engineered wood panels, adds a natural wooden look while remaining resistant to seasonal climate changes. Upholstered in anti-microbial and anti-allergic polyester fabric, it ensures a healthier seating experience. The full-core HDR foam provides firm, resilient support, while the lacquer coating delivers a smooth, abrasion-free feel.

fields.name: Monstera Lush Magnetic Fridge Planter
fields.description: Check out this adorable wall planter that's gonna transform your space. Its got this sleek, white vibe with cheerful green monstera leaves. Who doesnt love a little greenery? Perfect for adding a splash of nature to your kitchen or office. And it's so easy to hang! Just imagine, Sunday morning coffee with a fresh plant companion by your side. Cozy, right?

fields.name: VEDAS Wayanad Metal Leaf Wall Accent
fields.description: Add to your home office living room bedroom decor with this handcrafted wall arts piece. It will give an elegant look to your home decor. Attractive and eye-catcher look with royal finish also for a batter match with your interior decoration. It makes a great centrepiece over your sofa or in your dining room. Let the flowers bloom as standalone or in set wall décor. Great for gifting during weddings, anniversaries, house-warming ceremonies, new venture, award ceremonies etc.

fields.name: Addison 3-Tier Corner Open Book Shelf
fields.description:
Add modern functionality to your space with this corner open bookshelf crafted from MDF with a matte melamine prelam finish. Resistant to scratches, stains, and heat, it offers durability and sleek appeal for organised, stylish storage.
Disclaim

fields.name: Canova Opt Arista Ceramic Cut-Out Vase
fields.description: Add artistic flair to your space with this ceramic cut-out vase. Its unique design and smooth finish make it perfect for displaying flowers or as a stylish decorative piece

fields.name: Croco Nested Table- Tan (Set Of Two)
fields.description: Introducing our Croco Nested Table - A stunning piece of accent furniture crafted with tan croco embossed genuine leather. It's edges age wrapped with tan waxy leather. Both the tables are supported with expertly crafted metal frame in antique-finish to provide strength through simple and clean lines. Elevate your living space with this exquisite combination of luxury and craftsmanship.

fields.name: Hadley Ceramic Top Console Table - Walnut
fields.description: Enhance your living room with this console table, crafted from engineered wood. The smooth MDF is termite and wood borer resistant, while the melamine finish adds a durable layer that protects against scratches, dents, moisture, heat, and stains. The ceramic top offers a solid, non-porous surface that withstands spills, scratches, cuts, and heat, making it ideal for high-traffic areas like dining and living rooms.

fields.name: slim wooden wall shelf
fields.description: This wooden wall shelf adds a unique look and feel to your home's decor while also providing a surprising amount of storage space. This mango wood handmade wooden shelf unit can be used to organize kitchen jars and condiments.

fields.name: Wooden Walnut floating shelf
fields.description: Smooth and flowy, just like the river. Amp up your special corner of your home with this timeless beauty. Holds your books, planters, vases or anything you want Choose from our unique collection of wooden wall shelves, wall shelf, wall mounted shelves Thoughtfully curated wooden racking shelves, wall shelves for bedroom, corner wall shelf, wood shelves Buy wooden shelf online, wooden shelves for living room, shelves for bedroom, wood storage racks Checkout more wooden wall shelves living room, designer wall shelves, wall mounted wooden shelves

fields.name: Morgen Premium Sheesham Wood Bookshelf
fields.description: The Morgen Premium Bookshelf is a stylish fusion of traditional craftsmanship and modern design, crafted from high-quality Sheesham wood in a rich teak finish. It features a beautifully handwoven cane front drawer for concealed storage and three spacious open shelves to organize books, décor, or everyday essentials. Compact and elegant, this bookshelf is perfect for adding both functionality and visual interest to your living room, bedroom, or study.

fields.name: Handpainted Warli Earthen Plates
fields.description: We are inspired today to create a healthy environment for our families but also with a mission to save and protect our earth. Only using materials available naturally, we aim to create beautiful products, while being friendly to the earth we all share. With that said, we are committed to protecting our delicate eco-system, by ensuring the products we create, do not endanger ourselves, nor do they endanger our planet.

fields.name: Brass Hans Metal Wall Planter
fields.description: Bring a touch of nature and elegance to your walls with the Wall Planter, Large. Crafted from durable metal in a stunning antique brass finish, this statement piece blends modern design with vintage charm. Perfect for showcasing indoor plants or hanging greenery, it adds warmth and style to any room. Ideal for home decor and garden spaces, this wall planter enhances your walls with a sophisticated, nature-inspired accent.

fields.name: Senorita Metal Standing Mirror
fields.description: Get this full-length mirror from Home Centre to enhance your bedroom decor. The aluminium frame, crafted from cost-effective recyclable material, ensures durability and strong load-bearing capacity, resistant to corrosion. The 3mm reflective mirror has bevelled edges, smoothly ground on all corners. The back panel is made of prelaminated fibreboards which has excellent screw-holding capacity, and treated against termites and borers. Place this in a cozy nook corner of your room to enhance the ambiance.

fields.name: VEDAS Ivy Metal Boat Wall Accent
fields.description: Add to your home office living room bedroom decor with this handcrafted wall arts piece. It will give an elegant look to your home decor. Attractive and eye catcher look with royal finish also for a batter match with your interior decoration. It makes a great centerpiece over your sofa or in your dining room. Let the flowers bloom as standalone or in set wall décor. Great for gifting during weddings, anniversaries, house warming ceremonies, new venture, award ceremonies etc.

fields.name: Countryside Charm Cottage Wall Painting
fields.description: Imagine gazing into a serene landscape where mountains embrace the sky, and cottages nestle by a babbling brook. This painting its like a window to a peaceful world! The earthy colors blend into a harmonious scene that just feels like a cozy hug. And the best part? Its got that perfect balance of vibrant hues and subtle textures to make your wall pop. Who wouldnt want to escape into this scenery after a long day? Just imagine curling up with a cup of tea, letting your mind wander into those painted hills.

fields.name: Rotara Textured Wall Plate
fields.description: Introducing the Rotara Wall Plate, a stunning handcrafted piece that blends rustic charm with luxurious sophistication. Featuring a beautiful grey and gold finish, this wall plate showcases small, round impressions scattered throughout.

fields.name: VERA Green 27 Piece Dinner Set
fields.description: The color green is equated with peace and tranquility. And meals are really not complete unless they convey delight and satisfaction. The Vera Green collection will heighten the sense of fulfillment. The green hue, which is capped with a golden rim, enriches the dining experience and provides joy from within. 6 dinner plates, 6 side plates, 6 dessert bowls, 6 side bowls, 2 service bowls, and 1 long-serving plate are included in the Vera Green set.

fields.name: Ebony Classic 15Pcs Bone China Printed Tea Set
fields.description: Experience timeless elegance with this bone china tea set. Featuring beautiful prints, this set includes a teapot, cups, saucers, sugar pot, and creamer, perfect for hosting guests or enjoying a refined tea moment every day.

fields.name: Wooden Caddy and Cutlery Stand
fields.description: Elevate your dining experience with this Exquisite wooden cutlery holder. Crafted from high-quality oak wood, it features a rustic yet elegant design that seamlessly blends with any decor style. The holder showcases intricate carvings of cutlery icons, adding a touch of artistry to your tabletop. With ample space to organise your forks, knives, and spoons, it keeps your cutlery neatly arranged and easily accessible.

fields.name: Ribbed White Cup And Stand
fields.description:
Description
Start your mornings right with this complete four-piece ceramic cup set that brings charming organisation to your kitchen.

fields.name: Sunflower Bloom Ceramic Serving Bowls with
fields.description: These Sunflower Bloom Designer Ceramic Serving Bowls with lid are perfect for serving and storing your favorite dishes. Made with high-quality ceramic, these bowls are both beautiful and functional. With their elegant sunflower design, they add a touch of style to any table setting. Keep your food fresh and presentable with the included lid

fields.name: Hetty Floral Mangowood Serving Tray
fields.description: This wooden serving tray is like a garden party on a plate! Its bold red and white flowers pop against a serene blue background, making it perfect for tea time or breakfast in bed. And those handles? They make carrying a breeze. Ever thought serving could be this stylish? Well, it just might be with this beauty. Imagine Sunday mornings with chai, windows open, and this tray by your side. Ah, bliss!

fields.name: Niko Beacon Mango Wood Printed Cake Stand
fields.description: Crafted from durable mango wood and a sturdy metal base, this printed cake stand brings rustic charm and elegance to any setting. Ideal for displaying cakes or treats at parties, gatherings, or everyday use.

fields.name: Nuqta Roi Wooden Serving Tray
fields.description: This sturdy wooden tray with sleek metal handles offers rustic charm and modern ease, perfect for serving snacks, drinks, or as a standalone decor.

fields.name: Kopi Ceramic Coffee Mug
fields.description: Brighten your coffee breaks with the Kopi Ceramic Coffee Mug Set in a cheerful yellow finish. Designed for everyday use and styled to stand out, these mugs blend modern aesthetics with practical comfort. The glossy ceramic finish gives them a premium look, while the ergonomic handle ensures a comfortable grip for your daily coffee, tea, or hot chocolate.

fields.name: Nuqta Roi Wooden Tissue Box
fields.description: This wooden tissue box adds a warm, natural charm to your space. Crafted for durability with a smooth finish, it keeps tissues neatly accessible while enhancing your décor with a simple, elegant touch.

fields.name: HOMESAKE Wooden Table Lamp
fields.description: Brighten up your space with the playful charm and cosy light of this table lamp. It features a disc-shaped base made of wood for added stability and a fabric shade in a cylindrical shape with delightful giraffe art. Designed with an E27 holder for easy bulb fitting. It makes a perfect accent for kids' rooms, bedside tables, or creative corners.

fields.name: HOMESAKE Metal Cluster Ceiling Lamp
fields.description: Illuminate your dining room or living room with this striking cluster pendant, which features three graduated half-globe-shaped lights suspended from a round plate on black-finished rods artfully displayed at different heights. Rich, rustic, and unmistakably stylish, this gorgeous 3-light hanging fixture marries brilliant character with impeccable taste.

fields.name: HOMESAKE Metal Wall Lamp
fields.description: Oil rubbed rust wall, light body and retro lamp design make the place full of vintage feel, fitting nicely in many decors, especially for the bedroom, restaurant, café, living room, kitchen, country house, and study. It is not only lighting but also a beautiful decoration for your space.

fields.name: HOMESAKE Metal Floor Lamp
fields.description: Homesake classy unique modern metal floral floor lamps with drum shades are perfect to create an instant make-over and introduce warmth and ambience to any corner in the house. It is easy to incorporate into your room decor, thanks to its versatile neutral hue. The matte black antique metal finish on the traditional candlestick-style lamp brings a feeling of ancient elegance to a space. The combination of the refined look of the floor lamp and the glow created by the linen drum shade makes this style the perfect addition to traditional interiors.

fields.name: Victorian Candle Chandelier
fields.description: Bring a warm, luxurious glow into your home with this 6-light Victorian chandelier. Designed with candle-style arms, elegant crystal accents, and a rich amber finish, it combines timeless charm with a cozy, golden radianceâ€”perfect for creating inviting interiors.

fields.name: Riviera Dune Ceramic Table Lamp
fields.description: This ceramic table lamp, featuring a sophisticated design, offers a refined update to your decor. It's linen fabric shade softly illuminates light, making it ideal for a bedside table.

fields.name: Colossal Athan Metal Etched Vase
fields.description: Crafted from sturdy iron, this vase blends industrial charm with timeless elegance. Its sleek finish and minimalist design make it a striking accent piece for modern or rustic interiors.

fields.name: Pegasus Bravia Polypropylene LED Lantern
fields.description: Enhanced with a refined design, this hanging lantern showcases a glass frame with a polypropylene panel, ideal for candle decoration. Its intricate patterns, creating a fusion of modern and vintage aesthetics. The convenient holding hook facilitates easy hanging or display.

fields.name: Gardenia Mirage Metal 2-Tier Floor Planter
fields.description: Add height and greenery to your space with this sleek 2-Tier floor planter. Designed for both style and function, it features a sturdy metal frame with 2 spacious tiers, perfect for displaying a variety of plants while saving floor space. Ideal for indoor or covered outdoor use.

fields.name: Golden Elephant Showpiece
fields.description: The Feng Shui Golden Elephant Showpiece with Wooden Base is a simple and elegant decor piece that comes with its set of benefits. Taking inspiration from Rustic Decor, the table accent showcases an elephant with a raised trunk is supposed to bring luck. This piece shall also enable the creation of a stronger bond between the parents and children.

fields.name: Gold Polyresin Cheetah Book Ends
fields.description: Add a regal safari touch to your decor with this pair of antique gold cheetah figurines on elegant pedestal bases. Intricately crafted with lifelike textures and poised postures, perfect as bookends or luxe console accents.

fields.name: Bronze 7 Arm Tapered Candelabra with Hanging Crystals
fields.description: This antique-style bronze candelabra features seven holders adorned with cascading crystal droplets for a luxurious sparkle. Its vintage charm and elegant detailing make it a perfect centerpiece for both classic and contemporary interiors.

fields.name: Sequena Iron Vase
fields.description: Want to add a dash of elegance to your space? This stunning vase is a masterpiece of modern design. Its gold finish, with a hint of patina, feels like a relic from an ancient world. And heres the best partits made of sturdy iron, giving it a solid, timeless feel. Imagine it nestled next to your favorite armchair.

fields.name: Evora Fabric Accent Chair
fields.description: Enhance your living room with this accent chair, crafted with a pinewood and high-density plywood frame. Featuring solid wood legs and durable polyester fabric, its modern design offers lasting comfort and a refined finish.

fields.name: Botanical NXT Fabric Wing Chair
fields.description: Ideal for unwinding after a long day, this wing chair offers comfort and relaxation. Crafted with pinewood and polyester fabric upholstery, it features PU foam seats and a zigzag spring system for extra comfort. The back cushion is filled with polyfiber for optimal back support. With solid wood legs for strength and durability, this sofa ensures long-lasting support.

fields.name: Sylvester Plus Fabric 3-Seater Sofa
fields.description: This 3-seater sofa from Home Centre is elegant and brings an element to your living room. The frame is constructed from pretreated pine wood, which is stable, elastic, lightweight, and resistant to moisture and wood infestation. For added stability, corner blocks are included to support the sofa during movement, along with a middle leg for extra support. The seat construction features full core HDR PU foam, offering firm, resilient comfort. Additionally, the sofa incorporates a webbing and zigzag spring system, utilizing 3.8mm mild steel wires with an anti-corrosive powder-coated finish. These springs are clipped to the frame with metal clamps, ensuring uniform seat comfort. This sofa is upholstered with antimicrobial and anti-allergenic polyester fabric.

fields.name: Abby Fabric 3-Seater Sofa with Cushions
fields.description: Bring comfort and style to your living space with this 3-seater sofa. The rubber wood frame provides exceptional resilience and long-lasting support. Upholstered in premium polyester fabric, known for its durability and high tensile strength, it ensures both comfort and durability. The sofa includes two patterned cushions, offering extra support and style.

fields.name: Helios Anne Fabric 3-Seater Sofa Bed
fields.description: Anne Sofa Cum Bed - This is a contemporary design made of E2 Engineered wood board with a melamine finish on the top to give a modern look to your living room. Also, the high glossy laminated black finish in the bottom drawer storage unit and in the backrest provide a premium finish and look to the unit to fit perfectly into your living room.

fields.name: Hadley Fabric Dresser Stool
fields.description: Complete your vanity setup with this elegant and functional dresser stool. Crafted from engineered wood with a melamine finish, it offers durability and a smooth, refined look. The tri-leg frame supports a cushioned seat upholstered in breathable, easy-to-clean polyester fabric for comfortable daily use.

fields.name: Diamond Fabric Stool
fields.description: Highlighted with an open frame, this stool combines practicality with style. It is constructed from recyclable mild steel with curvy bars that lend an elegant look. The seat is upholstered in a velvet fabric to complete the opulent style. This stool can be added to your living space, vanity counter, or kid’s bedroom to enhance its functionality.

fields.name: Lotus Fabric Ottoman
fields.description: Accentuate your decor while adding to the functionality of your space with this ottoman. It features mango wood legs and is topped with a cylindrical seat upholstered in polyester fabric for durability. The geometric tufting on the sides adds to the style.

fields.name: Giza Composite Marble Top Coffee Table
fields.description: Engage in rich conversations, share important values, and encourage a lifelong interest with this coffee table. Featuring a luxurious composite marble top, this table offers unparalleled resilience, boasting less porousness, durability, and rigidity. Crafted from mango wood with a clear and wood stain lacquer finish, it ensures enduring beauty with unparalleled resistance against scratches, dents, and stains. The mango wood frame, kiln-dried to remove excess moisture content, ensures minimal expansion or contraction with seasonal changes. Its prelaminated fibreboard extracts provide a stronger core with exceptional screw-holding capacity, chemically treated against termites and borers. Plus, PVC leg bushings are included to prevent direct floor contact, ensuring stability and longevity.

fields.name: Gohan NXT Coffee Table
fields.description: Marvel at the marble magic of this coffee table and let it elevate your living space with a touch of extraordinary elegance. Crafted with top-quality real marble featuring an epoxy coating for exceptional heat and scratch resistance, this table seamlessly blends practicality with sophistication. The sleek gloss finish on the base complements the sturdy metal steel frame, ensuring unparalleled durability for both indoor and outdoor use, with impressive load-bearing capacity. Meticulously crafted from premium metal steel, this table not only offers exceptional cost-effectiveness but also exhibits outstanding resistance to scratches, chipping, dents, moisture, and corrosion. Furthermore, the metal frame undergoes a rigorous pretreatment process to prevent rust formation, ensuring a timeless investment in both style and functionality.

fields.name: Clair De Lune Faux Marble Top Coffee Table
fields.description: Experience elegance with this coffee table featuring a faux marble epoxy-coated top. Crafted from termite-resistant engineered wood certified to European E2 standards, it boasts PU-clad MDF panels for a premium finish, combining easy maintenance with consistent, stylish patterns.

fields.name: Brass Wooden Bala Side Table
fields.description: Upgrade your space with our high-quality wood Accent & End Tables. Meticulously designed, these tables bring sophistication and functionality to any room. Experience timeless elegance and durability in every detail.

fields.name: Anish Fusion Nested Coffee Table
fields.description: The Anish Fusion Nested Coffee Table combines textures and shapes for a modern touch in your living space. Its solid wood frame and elegant marble nested table contrast warm wood tones, highlighting the natural grain. This striking piece embodies elegance and functionality, making it a perfect centerpiece for any living space

fields.name: Perisi Side Table
fields.description: The Perisi Side Table starts with a thick wood top with a demi-bullnose edge giving it a soft yet great character. Followed by a playfully round block of wood which finally rests on a scuba tank like metal base.

fields.name: Terrain Console Table
fields.description:
The Terrain collection combines sophisticated style with smart functionality through its multi-tiered design in rich coffee tones. Featuring warm wood surfaces and sleek black metal frames, these tables maximize surface area while maintaining a clean, organized aesthetic.

The tiered structure creates natural zones for both display and storage—upper surfaces for daily essentials like beverages and candles, while lower shelves discretely house books, magazines, and decorative objects.

fields.name: Brown Milan Wooden Console
fields.description: A refined approach to utility defines this wood console, created to combine display and storage within a slim, structured form. The smooth surface supports decorative styling while maintaining a clean visual flow. Its balanced proportions allow it to sit comfortably in living rooms or entry spaces. Designed to enhance organisation without clutter, it feels effortlessly adaptable. Style with table lamps, curated objects and framed artwork for a composed interior vignette.

fields.name: Hand Carved Distressed White Console Table
fields.description: Experience the exquisite Distressed White Handcrafted Console Table, a true work of art crafted by skilled artisans in India. Made with high-quality mango wood, this timeless piece adds character to any decor. Custom dimensions available. Timely delivery is guaranteed. Elevate your home decor with this sophisticated statement piece.

fields.name: HOME SPARKLE Set of 3 Floating Wall Shelves
fields.description: This set of wall shelves transforms your walls into a stunning display. Crafted from high-quality MDF, they are sturdy and durable. These floating shelves offer a unique, geometric design with louvers detailing that enhances any room’s aesthetics while providing practical storage and display solutions.

fields.name: Kai LED Floating Wall Shelf
fields.description: Enhance your space with this floating wall shelf. Crafted from high-quality MDF, its high-gloss membrane foil finish offers seamless fascia and edge lamination for a refined, premium look. It also features a built-in LED light powered by batteries for added convenience.

fields.name: Penny Corner Bookshelf
fields.description: Maximize your space with our stylish and practical Penny Corner Bookshelf. This versatile storage unit is not just for holding books; it’s designed to organize your books, decor, and other essentials while enhancing the look of every corner.

fields.name: 5 Tier Corner Ladder Shelf for
fields.description: Introducing our stylish and stunning wooden 5 tier corner ladder shelf for home decor that has been designed to provide you with an opportunity to maximize space in your homes. Designed for fitting perfectly into smaller spaces, our wooden 5 tier corner ladder shelf for home decor is the perfect blend of functionality and style. Crafted from high quality sheesham wood, it lends to the durability of the wood providing you with aesthetic practicality and beauty.

fields.name: Jasper Leaning Ladder Shelf
fields.description: This ladder shelf will add stylish storage to the living space that creates an appealing display. The five graduated shelves make it possible to maximize the floor space. The 5-tier bookcase ladder shelf is ideal for storing CDs, books, collectibles, home decorations, pictures and more. The sleek design offers rooms with a fresh appearance with a simple yet well-designed style of the useful ladder shelves. Keep any room in the house neat and arranged with the stunning functionality of this wall leaning shelf.

fields.name: Riana Ladder Bookshelf
fields.description: Introducing the Guarented Riana Ladder Bookshelf - your stylish storage solution for home or office décor. Crafted from durable engineered wood, this freestanding bookstand features a unique ladder design with multiple open shelves, providing ample space to display books, décor items, or office essentials. With its rich brown finish, it adds warmth and sophistication to any space while keeping your belongings organized and easily accessible. Elevate your home or office décor with the Guarented Riana Ladder Bookshelf.

fields.name: Minimal High Definition Round Mirror
fields.description: Introducing the Orbit – High Definition Round Mirror, a stunning fusion of modern design and exceptional clarity. Perfect for enhancing any room, this mirror serves as both a functional piece and a statement of elegance, bringing light and openness to your living space.

fields.name: Streamline Wall Mirror
fields.description: Add a touch of elegance and functionality to your space with the Streamline Mirror. With its clean lines and minimalist charm, this mirror is designed to elevate any room — from entryways and bedrooms to dressing corners and bathrooms.

fields.name: Artistry Regalia Canvas Tree Picture Frame
fields.description: Enhance your walls with this elegant tree picture frame. Crafted from canvas with foil embossed details add a shimmer, while a sturdy PS frame with MDF backing provides depth. Perfect for modern or nature-inspired decor, it’s a stylish focal point.

fields.name: Germenia Wall Painting
fields.description: Hey, check this out! A burst of orange and grey blooms that dance across a canvas like they're in the middle of a windy field. Isnt it stunning? With its rich textures and earthy vibes, its perfect for adding some flair to your living room wall. And you know what? Its just one piece, so no fussing with multiple frames. Imagine it Sunday chai, windows open, this beauty catching the morning light

fields.name: Rachele Metal Vase
fields.description: Ever wanted your walls to make a statement? These asymmetrical metal vases are just the ticket! Theyve got that sleek gold framing and fluffy pampas grass in colors that popthink blush pink and deep burgundy. Perfect for adding a dash of whimsy to your living room or bedroom. And lets be honest, who doesnt love a bit of unexpected flair? The whole setup feels like a cozy Sunday morning with chai, windows wide open, and sunlight pouring in. A little dramatic, a lot beautiful.

fields.name: Sera Sage Green 14 Piece Ceramic Dinner Set
fields.description: Turn every meal into a refined dining experience with the Sera green dinner set, designed to blend elegance with everyday practicality. Perfect for intimate family dinners or hosting guests, the set includes 6 dinner plates, 2 serving bowls, and 6 small bowls, crafted to impress.

fields.name: Golden Dinner Set with Green Exterior
fields.description: Introducing our Golden Dinner Set with Green Exterior, a luxurious and captivating ensemble designed to bring opulence and elegance to your dining experience. This set of 23 pieces includes 6 dinner plates, 6 quarter plates, 6 small bowls, 2 serving bowls, 1 serving tray, and 2 bowls, each adorned with a golden finish and a striking green exterior

fields.name: Ferado Dinnerware
fields.description: Hey there, ever seen a dinner set that feels like a warm hug? This ceramic beauty is just that, with its speckled ivory design and earthy brown rims. Perfect for those cozy family dinners or impressing guests with your rustic charm. And guess what? Its not just prettyit's super practical too! Freezer, oven, microwave, and dishwasher safe. Imagine Sunday brunch, a gentle breeze, and this set laid out, making everything feel just right.

fields.name: Classic Cup and Saucer Set
fields.description: Handmade Pottery, crafted with utmost care and expertise in India. These delicate creations are not only visually stunning but also practical, as they are designed to be Microwave and Dishwasher safe.

fields.name: Ivory Zilver Set of 6 Bone China Printed Cup and Saucer
fields.description: This printed cup and saucer set offers both elegance and durability. Crafted from sturdy bone china, the cup is perfect for enjoying your favourite hot beverages. At the same time, the saucer provides a practical base to catch any drips and add a touch of sophistication.

fields.name: Meadows Theme Set of 6 PVC Floral Print Placemats
fields.description: Add a touch of elegance to your dining experience with this floral placemat. Made from durable PVC, it is lightweight, easy to clean, and resistant to stains and spills. Crafted for both everyday use and special occasions, this placemat not only protects your table but also enhances your dining decor with its sophisticated, aesthetic appeal.

fields.name: Malta Wooden Serving Bowl Medium
fields.description:
Add Mediterranean chic to your table with this serving bowl! Crafted from mango wood with an enameled interior, it has a thoughtful design that combines a stylish look with practical functionality.  
The enameled interior features botanical motifs in blue on a white background, with a blue and white striped overhang around the rim. Perfect for serving snacks and dishes, this bowl is also a great decor accent at the coffee-table!

fields.name: Multi Ceramic Decaled Luxe Serving Bowl
fields.description: A decaled porcelain serving bowl adorned with vibrant colors and 24-carat gold accents, designed for festive table settings. Its intricate pattern and luxurious finish add a refined touch to your serveware. Clean with mild detergent, avoiding abrasives to preserve its elegance.

fields.name: Corsica Hues Wooden Peacock Serving Tray
fields.description: This elegant serving tray features a vibrant enamel peacock design on a sturdy MDF base. Lightweight yet durable, it adds a touch of artful charm to serving snacks, drinks, or decor.

fields.name: Nesto Vogue Melamine Printed Serving Tray
fields.description: Minimise your essentials with this multipurpose melamine serving tray. Its printed surface, raised edges, and rectangular shape offer ample space and spill-free convenience, perfect for serving drinks, snacks, or daily tasks.

fields.name: Gold Metal Scalloped Leaf Decorative Platter
fields.description: Elevate your coffee or center table with this exquisite gold metal leaf platter. Its delicate scalloped design and cut-out details will lend a touch of nature-inspired sophistication to your space. Meticulously crafted, its a versatile centerpiece for any stylish setting.

fields.name: Round Serving platter table top buffet organizer platter stand
fields.description: Nestroots Round Buffet Organiser with 3 shelf is perfect for when you're hosting a party and even for your everyday. Round shape Dessert stand display the Eye cathching metal serving platter buffet organizer

fields.name: Ayra Table Lamp
fields.description: The Ayra Table Lamp draws from the elegance of a canopy, with a tall brass sheen that adds quiet luxury. Its vertical lines elongate the space, while the soft shade diffuses light with warmth. Compact yet impactful, it’s ideal for side tables or bedsides.

fields.name: Ballet Table Lamp
fields.description: Introduce a sense of calm and sophistication with the Ballet Table Lamp, where minimalist design meets natural craftsmanship. Featuring a solid wooden base and a delicately crafted high-quality paper shade, it emits a soft, diffused glow that warms any room. With its serene, earthy aesthetic, this lamp effortlessly complements both modern and traditional interiors-making it a timeless piece that adds quiet charm and ambient lighting to your home.

fields.name: Century Modern Floor Lamp for Living Room
fields.description: 𝐌𝐎𝐃𝐄𝐑𝐍 𝐌𝐈𝐃 𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐘 𝐅𝐋𝐎𝐎𝐑 𝐋𝐀𝐌𝐏: This floor lamp features a fabric shade in a Jute hue and a wooden base with intricate carvings, adding a touch of elegance to any living space, make our standing lamp perfectly for various decor schemes such as retro modern, traditional, mid-century, classic, vintage, rustic or any occasions like living room, bedroom, office, study room or a wonderful,

fields.name: Industrial Tree Floor Lamp
fields.description: Elegant Appearance: With minimalist yet stylish design, this industrial floor lamp combines metal in black finish with an organic spiraling series of unique cup-shaped

fields.name: Radiant Round LED Chandelier
fields.description: Introducing the Radiant Round LED Chandelier, a contemporary marvel in lighting design. Its round shape and sleek lines exude modern elegance, complemented by the bright LED light it emits. Crafted with French gold metal and clear acrylic, it boasts a unique aesthetic that adds sophistication to any space. Emitting warm light, it's perfect for living rooms, dining areas, or bedrooms. Its flush-mounted design makes it ideal for low-height spaces, ensuring both style and functionality in your home.

fields.name: Piping Hot Double LED Wall Light
fields.description: The Piping Hot Double LED Wall Light is a stunning combination of rose gold and acrylic, adding a touch of elegance to any space. Its sleek, minimalist design suits modern interiors, making it a perfect choice for living rooms, dining areas, and bedrooms. The LED lights offers warm illumination, creating a cozy atmosphere while enhancing the decor. With its stylish look and versatile application, this wall light is both functional and visually appealing. Can be installed vertically or horizontally as per your requirement.

fields.name: Eclat Vintage Wall Light
fields.description: Enhance your interiors with the timeless charm of the Eclat Vintage Wall Light. Featuring a stunning brass finish and an elegant fabric shade, this wall-mounted fixture brings warmth and sophistication to any space. Perfect for bedrooms, hallways, or living areas, it adds a touch of classic luxury to your décor.

fields.name: European Style Brass Wall Lamp Clear Glass Lamp Shade
fields.description: Light up your space with timeless style: The European Style Brass Wall Lamp, featuring a clear glass lamp shade.

fields.name: Moksha Ceramic Waves Vase
fields.description: Add a touch of elegance to your decor with this ceramic vase. Featuring a sculpted wavy design and smooth finish, it beautifully complements both fresh and artificial floral arrangements.

fields.name: Fiora Delphi Glass Tulip Pedestal candle Holder
fields.description: This tulip-shaped glass candle holder features a delicate form that gently diffuses warm light, bringing elegance and soft illumination to tabletops, mantels, or festive decor arrangements

fields.name: Ember Opt Metal Zig-Zag Pillar Candle Holder
fields.description: Elevate your ambiance with striking candle holder. Crafted from sturdy metal, this zig-zag pillar candle holder blends modern style with bold structure, making it a standout accent for any room or centrepiece display.

fields.name: Gardenia Fest Set of 2 Metal Floor Planters with Stand
fields.description: Showcase your greenery in style with these metal floor planters. Each comes with a sturdy metal stand, combining durability and elegance to elevate any indoor or outdoor space with a modern touch.

fields.name: Mini   Table-top   Metal   Planter,   Set   (Pot   Only)
fields.description: Elegant handcrafted cylindrical plant stands with a modern design, made from high-quality metal. Handmade in India, the brass finish complements any décor, ideal for real plants, succulents, or faux flowers. Perfect for living rooms, offices, or restaurants, these versatile stands also make thoughtful gifts. (Plants not included)

fields.name: Gardenia Mirage Set of 2 Floor Planters with Stand
fields.description: Crafted from durable iron, these planters are a chic choice to enhance your living area with greenery. The design on the planter adds an elegance, while the stand features a sleek design. Whether placed indoors or outdoors, it exudes a rustic charm that complements your plants effectively.

fields.name: Abstract Ammonite Showpiece For Home Decor
fields.description: In the depths of imagination, where artistry meets opulence, we at Nestasia have created a decor showpiece that is a true testament to the fusion of modern glamour and timeless elegance. Handcrafted from premium quality, sustainable resin, this decor object stands as a shining example of our commitment to eco-conscious craftsmanship and the finesse of skilled artisans. As your eyes trace the graceful curves of its abstract form, you'll find yourself transported to ancient realms, where the beauty of nature intertwines with the allure of contemporary design. Its ribbed textured surface, reminiscent of the spiral intricacies of an ammonite fossil, invites touch and admiration, evoking a sense of wonder and fascination.

fields.name: Luxe Linked Hoops Decor
fields.description:
Whether styled on a console, bookshelf, or work desk, this resin chain-link sculpture adds a touch of bold sophistication to your space.
This resin decor piece features an elegant chain-link design, crafted in a vertical arrangement of four interlocked rings. Each link showcases a contrasting metallic hue of silver, gold, bronze, and copper, creating a dynamic gradient of tones. Mounted on a sleek black circular base, the sculpture embodies a balance of industrial edge and modern sophistication. Its textured finish and abstract form make it a striking centrepiece for contemporary interiors.
